name: golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev
title: golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev
summary: convenience functions for using structs with the database/sql package
description:
convenience functions for using structs with the database/sql package
Package sqlstruct provides some convenience functions for using structs with
the Go standard library's database/sql package.
.
The package matches struct field names to SQL query column names. A field can
also specify a matching column with "sql" tag, if it's different from field
name.  Unexported fields or fields marked with `sql:"-"` are ignored, just like
with "encoding/json" package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev because convenience functions for using structs with the database/sql package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-kisielk-sqlstruct-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
